High Ticket Sales Script
Page 1 of 13
BUILD RAPPORT
Go over their application form prior to call to refresh.
Small talk. Ask them how they are doing. Don’t answer any big questions about food, etc.
because you can say “we’re going to cover some things in more depth that I think will answer
that question in a better deeper way”.
You should have given them EXCEPTIONAL service up to this point, hand-written cards, wow
packages, a few personal videos etc., so you should feel comfortable.
PRE-FRAME/POSITION FOR CLOSE
My ultimate goal is to give you long term clarity.
Basically going over…
Here’s where you are
Here’s what you’ve done
Here’s why it didn’t work
Here’s what you’re doing now, that’s working
Then, figuring out “what would be the perfect game plan you could stick with forever”.
Because to be honest, the first plan I provided is just something to get you started but
is not a sustainable FOREVER plan. And until we get that figured out specifically FOR
YOU, you are going to spin your wheels. That is a promise.
So, for us, this first 10-14 days represents kind of a “let’s see if we can work together,
will this person execute, are they smart & motivated. Are they cool & positive in the
community? And I think you are all those things and more. If you don’t mind my saying
so...
Prospect - Ha, no.
The goal is to go, "Okay, this is what you need and until you find it, you're gonna be
stuck," and that's how this discovery process works. Make sense?
THREE OPTIONS
Now... By the end of this if you feel this is a good fit and I do as well there will be 3
options for you.
One - you can say you “yes” want to work on your long-term goals and create a
SUSTAINABLE program to solve this issue once & for all (and never need a coach
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 1 of 13 --

High Ticket Sales Script
Page 2 of 13
again). Obviously, that’s cool with us and we’ll get you going with your first in depth
strategy session.
Two - You can say “no” you don’t want to work on your long-term goals or create a
sustainable program or you don’t have the resources to make it work. And that’s
TOTALLY cool. You won’t hurt my feelings. Seriously.
Three - Some people say they “need to think about it”, or check on some things, and
get back to me later. And after having enough of these conversations, I’ve figured out
that people who do not take action immediately will continue to not take action.
Because of my past experiences here, I’m just going to look for a simple yes or no
answer since we know people who are unsure stay unsure. I and I am fine EITHER WAY
YES OR NO. Is that cool?
So, before I dive into figuring out the first half of the long-term strategy for you, are
you 100% able to make a yes/no decision on your own.
If spouse needed:
Totally cool. Let’s reschedule this for a time we can all talk together. It’s typically easier
to go over this all at once than banana phone bits & pieces. Then if decide to work
together, we can figure out a financial plan and I’ll be there to answer both your
questions in real time. It’s just maximizes everyone’s time, cool?
LONG TERM GOAL/ BIG “WHY”
Let's just start at the top. I like to go over this again because sometimes even when you
start working out, your brain chemistry changes (not kidding) and people’s goals
change.
What’s your big long-term goal?
And why is it important to you?
Why is it worth prioritizing around?
DIGGING FOR GOLD
Why is it important to you?
What’s most important to you about THAT? Or what do you think is going to happen
that is meaningful that is not happening right now? (Say both in a row.
Has to be emotional. Has to be specific.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 2 of 13 --

High Ticket Sales Script
Page 3 of 13
Example: “Wanna be a good example for my kids” IS NOT ENOUGH!
Get to: “I dont want my kids to develop bad habits like I did and grow up and struggle with
their weight like I am” THAT has teeth.
Note. This answer is you SECRET WEAPON. This is what we will circle back to any
objection/second-guessing should come back and DRIVE this point again. Because all that
happens is that they FORGET WHY it is so important and try and say something else is MORE
important (when in fact it isn’t, it’s just FEAR).
WHERE THEY ARE AT
What is your biggest struggle?
What’s been preventing you from succeeding?
If they can’t think...lead them...Priorities? Time? Knowledge? Sustainability?
What have you tried in the past?
HOW DO YOU FEEL ABOUT IT
How long have you struggled with this?
What other areas of your life has it affected?
How do you feel when you you’re not where you want to be, or moving towards your
goal?
How does it impact your family and friends?
COST OF INACTION
How is _THEIR MAIN MICRO LEVEL WHY/SECRET WEAPON — “How are your kids eating
habits and long-term success in life going to be affected…”_ if you don’t deal with the
problems you’re facing?
What else will be affected if you don’t fix this for good?
How will the quality of the rest of your life look?
How will your finances be affected? Medical bills, kids taking care of you, cost of
thousands of other “tries & fails”, cost of personal trainers, etc.
How will this affect your family & kids? (If not already covered.)
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 3 of 13 --

High Ticket Sales Script
Page 4 of 13
RECAP
So, this would make _(your kids struggle later on, make your husband see you
negatively, it would cost you lots of money and lots of time and stress and the feeling
of constantly failing and identifying with “struggling” as a part of your identity)_.
FUTURE PACE
What do you think a “perfect” program would need to look like for you to succeed?
We find having a crystal-clear vision of where you want to go helps people make it a
reality. After all, you can get somewhere you haven’t yet articulated.
So, what would your life look like if this were implemented?
How would all the areas we just talked about look like?
How would you FEEL if things were this way? About yourself?
ADMIT THEY NEED YOUR HELP
What is stopping you from getting their own your own? Why haven’t you achieved this
yet on your own?
Great. Honestly, given what you just said, you have a lot in common with the people
who have seen the most radical transformations from our _Name of program selling -
Ex: FIT FOREVER_ program. Would you like me to tell you about it?
Prospect - Yes, please.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 4 of 13 --

High Ticket Sales Script
Page 5 of 13
THREE PILLAR PITCH
_Name_, that’s great. I’m glad you said that because we can 100% help you make that
vision into a reality. It’s worth fighting for and you deserve that.
After doing this hundreds/thousands of times, we’ve gone back through our biggest
successes I’m talking 10 year+ sustainable I-have-the-body-I want, I-feel-the-way-I-want,
my-life-is-the-way-I-want transformations... to make case studies and found THREE
components they all had in common for their long term results.
Wanna know what they are?
Prospect - Yes, please.
Awesome. The three pillars are…
1) Flexible Dieting (SUSTAINABLE NUTRITION)
2) Exercise-Lifestyle Fit (DESIRABLE FITNESS)
3) Transition from External Accountability to Internal Accountability (SUSTAINABLE
MOTIVATION)
Structure for each point: 1) Make point 2) Give Example/Analogy 3) Recap
Pillar I: Flexible Dieting (SUSTAINABLE NUTRITION)
MAKE POINT:
You need to discover how to eat whatever you want without sabotaging your results.
Essentially, you need to learn how to eat cake, have pizza, or whatever your “thing” is,
and still be able to lose weight/maintain weight.
And before I dive into that, we just have to establish one simple truth: what you eat is
going to be 90% of where your results come from.
And in the beginning, it starts with parameters (that’s what you got so far). You
eliminate before you modulate. Meaning, we take things out before we add them back
in. But LONG-TERM, you need to learn how to do this for yourself, so you never need
anyone to achieve what you want AND keep it.
And that’s the problem with most programs. They say “you have to eat exactly this or
exactly that, no more no less. “You have to eat chicken and broccoli every day for the
rest of your life and I can 100% help you hit your goal” but you and I both know it’s not
sustainable. And when you don’t, they say “suck it up, and if you don’t like it, tough shit.
That’s what it takes”
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 5 of 13 --

High Ticket Sales Script
Page 6 of 13
EXAMPLE:
The reality is there are 100s of ways to hit your goal because they all have the same
principles.
You could starve yourself - that would probably get you there.
You could stop eating carbs - sure that would probably get you there too.
You could do 3hrs/day of cardio, yep that could probably get you there.
You could eat no sugar - that might get you there too.
RECAP:
The point is, there are a million ways to get there, but which way is right for you. Thats
where the issue with coaches who believe ”my way or the highway” don’t understand
there the principles that underline long term transformation. And that is what you will
understand by the end of this. This is where your clarity will come in. And that is what I
will be handing over to you, a personally tailored nutrition framework that you will be
able to make your own, until eventually you don’t need it anymore.
Does that make sense? The reason you haven’t been able to succeed in the past is
because it wasn’t sustainable FOR YOU. By the end of this, you won’t need a coach.
Pillar II. Exercise-Lifestyle Fit
Ok awesome. So, let’s dive into pillar #2 - Exercise-Lifestyle Fit.
MAKE POINT:
You need to discover how to work out however YOU want without ruining your results.
Because if you work out for a certain way for 6 months or even a year, but you don’t
stick with it, what’s the point? Big picture, most of your life you still won’t be exercising.
So instead of spending hours in the gym trying to figure things out, I’m going to hand-
craft a program specifically tailored to your goals, your level, your preferences, your
schedule. Everything. Which means you can get maximum results, and have them stick,
without killing yourself or creating unrealistic unsustainable habits.
Does that make sense?
EXAMPLE:
So, we’re taking the same approach here as we are with your food. Making a
sustainable plan is what matters. And remember what we discussed before; nutrition
is still 90% of your results. So, this is the 10%. So, we need to make it something you
actually look forward to.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 6 of 13 --

High Ticket Sales Script
Page 7 of 13
Now what happens most times... a coach says “Hey Johnny, you need to do 1000 sit
ups, 2hrs of cardio, and workout twice a day, and you are going to see great results.
And if you don’t like it, you’re a weakling. Just do it.” But it’s the same problem as
before. Will it work? Sure. Will it work forever, what do you think?
Prospect - No.
Right, of course not.
And this is where a lot of confusion comes in. We see 10 different people with 10
different style of training and nutrition…
...One does fasted cardio
...One does HIIT
...Another runs marathons
...Another lifts weights only
...One does kickboxing
...One does only bodyweight
...one does early morning workouts
...one does late night workouts
…one eats 6 meals a day
...one does 2 meals a day
...one counts macros
...one eats clean
...another eats keto, or paleo etc.
And the list goes on....
The thing is, they all are doing 20 different things each, but there are only 1 or 2 things
that actually matter that drive it. Everything else is personalization.
This is where correlation & causation are disconnected.
We think “just because this guy is in shape, he must know” when in reality they’re
probably doing 20 things that are pure pseudoscience and two things that matter.
An easy analogy is...If you see a car going fast, one person says it’s because of the size
of its wheels, others say its because of the color, others say it’s because of the shape of
the car, and finally an engineer comes in and says it’s because of the V8 twin turbo
engine inside.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 7 of 13 --

High Ticket Sales Script
Page 8 of 13
The problem is, to a child or an alien who doesn’t know any better, they all sound
feasible. But the reason you get it is because you have clarity on what moves the car--
the engine. This program will give you that clarity on what MOVES body
transformation.
And that’s how they can all be 99% right, but 100% wrong. As in, sure if you get the
exact model of that person’s car, you can move. But maybe you like a coupe and you
like black cars. It would be like them saying it won’t work, when in reality, they just
don’t know what makes their car move.
RECAP:
This is how we tailor lifestyle-exercise fit. We know the few things that actually matter,
and then we can flavor it whatever way YOU LIKE. That’s what makes it the 100% RIGHT
program for YOU. and that can even change over time, and thats the beauty of getting
CLARITY on what you actually need vs extra bells & whistles.
Does that make sense?
Prospect – Yep.
Pillar III: External Accountability to Internal Motivation
MAKE POINT:
Alright awesome. So, what’s the third pillar? It’s external accountability. Now, the goal is
to coach you to internal motivation. But that takes time, which is why this is where we
start, but we have a clearly defined end.
EXAMPLE:
Mind you, most coaches will try and say “you’ll need a coach forever” because it is in
their best interest. We believe in setting people free, and our business grows from
referrals. We don’t need people to stay forever. In fact, I want you to graduate at the
end of this program and move on so I can help more people.
RECAP:
When you start out you are going to get unlimited access (call, text, facetime, video
etc). We try to respond within 5-10min unless I’m on a coaching call, then I respond in
between. We do this so we can make sure you stay on track with your goals in the
beginning while you are learning the ropes of this new better way of living.
From us you’ll get personalized coaching on mindset, peak performance, and
accountability from the best in the world.
This also allows us to recalibrate plans if necessary, to keep you smashing through
goals, so plateaus don’t really exist.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 8 of 13 --

High Ticket Sales Script
Page 9 of 13
Note: They are paying you $400-700/mo of pure profit. When you get to the point that you
have too many, then that is a GOOD problem, and we can accommodate fulfillment from
there.
PRICE PRE-FRAME
The reason you have struggled in the past is that you used restrictive unsustainable
plans. They are that way because their business model doesn’t allow for the time it
takes to individually tailor plans, which ultimately allows people to scale their business,
just not their clients results.
So, you have two options:
Option 1: Hire a personal trainer. The reason this is better than hiring a personal
trainer at a gym for $50-$200/session (and I say this, owning a gym/having owned a
gym) is that like we said earlier, nutrition is 90% of the battle. And they’re only covering
the 10%. And they’re training sessions most of the time so they cant give you the
support necessary.
So, you’re basically paying a premium price for something that only amounts to 10% of
the actual transformation results. Not to mention that most of them want you to keep
paying them to train you. So, you don’t get the freedom to learn how to work out on
your own. You’re not going to have a PT forever right?
Option 2: you buy a predesigned program for $47 to $200. The problem here is that it
isn’t customizable. And at a certain point, you will get tired of the workouts or the food
and jump to something else, and around and around you go. Spinning.
You wouldn’t bring a moped to a NASCAR race, race right? They’re fun & easy, but if
you want what you’re ultimately after, then you need to get a racecar. Everything else is
just a half-measure.
Right? So, those are your two options. So, what we do and why we're different is we
teach you how to do this stuff for life, so you don't have to keep paying us. That's the
deal.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 9 of 13 --

High Ticket Sales Script
Page 10 of 13
WHY WE CHARGE SO MUCH
And that’s the answer to why people ask “Well, Alex, why do you charge more?”
If the program cost you a couple hundred dollars, do you think honestly, I would really
be able to do what I am saying. Would you even believe me? No, of course not.
For me to help at the level I am talking about, permanent change so you can _SECRET
WEAPON_, it takes a team, otherwise I would quickly cap out. There would only be so
many people I could help, then that would be it.
So, it has to be a premium, otherwise if it were a couple hundred bucks i would have to
have thousands of active clients in order to pay the team, and there would be NO WAY
we could cater 1 on 1 to clients like what I am saying.
you’re going to be knowledgeable enough that by the end of this you could be a coach
for someone else, because that’s essentially what this is. You learn to become your
own coach. And you can use that skill for life.
MAKE IT REAL
So, what it looks like is me texting you in the morning saying “_Name_, how ya doin’?
What’s going on? Are you struggling? How can we adjust if needed?”.
Or you message me and say “Hey _Your name_, not sure what to do. My friends want
to go watch the game and get beers. What should I do?”
To which I would say “Relax. It’s going to be fine. Make this adjustment today, and that
tomorrow, and you can go enjoy beer and a burger. Cool?
And the next week, your still another step closer to your goal.
Because let’s be real. If you give up the events you want to look good FOR in order to
look good...that’s kind of like putting the cart before the horse. It makes no sense. We
want to look good for ourselves. To go out. Be social. You would essentially be
sacrificing life moments you will never get back, for abs or a butt or whatever.
I can tell you first hand, there is no point to being alone at home on a Friday night
weighing chicken with your 6 pack.
It’s just backwards.
And I’m telling you this because I did that, and I can tell you I was miserable. It felt like
an empty victory. I realized the only way to do this is to figure out how to do this
forever and be able to go on a date with my wife and have a glass of wine and a steak
and enjoy myself or have brownies & ice cream on my birthday. So that’s what I set out
to do. And did, and now I help others become their own coaches to set themselves
free. For good.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 10 of 13 --

High Ticket Sales Script
Page 11 of 13
ANSWER ANY QUESTIONS
I know we covered a lot. Does all that make sense?
Do you get why this will solve your problems for good?
Prospect - Yep.
ASK WHERE THEY WANT TO GO FROM HERE
Awesome. So where would you like to go from here? Feeling good?
Ready to get into the nitty gritty?
Prospect - Yep.
You sure? (Reconfirm to get them basically begging you to sell them.)
PRICE DROP
Alright, so there are two options: Option A & Option B
Option A:
• You work with me 1-on-1
• You don’t report to anyone else on my team but me
• More expensive, because as I have grown, more people wanted to work directly, so the
only fair way to do that was to raise the price.
• This option is only available when I have open slots. I only take on 7 clients at a time,
and right now I have 1 spot open. When it fills, this option is no longer available.
• If I didn’t do this, then everyone would work with me & we’d be capped in the amount
of people we can help.
• The program is 16 weeks, after that, you can continue on for significantly less, which is
about as long as it takes to get someone completely self-sufficient.
• After this point, you should never need another coach again. That being said, some
people do stay on because they like the encouragement and accountability, but that is
100% their choice. You will NOT need me. But you can choose to stay, and if you do, it’s
at a reduced rate because at that point, you mostly don’t need a lot of help on my side.
You know the ropes and its mostly for community & encouragement.
• But you can 1000% leave at the end, no hard feelings. Its built for that.
• So, there are two options. Option A, like I said, you work directly with me and no one
else.
• If you decide to take that option, it’s $3900 and takes 16 weeks. Okay?
o IF THEY DO NOT GASP YOU DID NOT GO HIGH ENOUGH
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 11 of 13 --

High Ticket Sales Script
Page 12 of 13
Price Qualification/Sigh of Relief
• Now if you feel like this program is exactly what you need but the price made your eyes
pop out or gave you a mini stroke
• What we do is - as long as you can put down a minimum deposit which just shows “Yes,
I’m serious, I want to be in. I feel good about you and this program and moving
forward.” Then we’re fine.
Option B
• So as long as you can do that, I cut the price in half, which drops it to $1900
• Only difference here is that I am not your ONLY contact. You would work directly with
me AND my team.
• This way, I can make sure that you get fast responses to every question. Because, I
mean, if you paid me $3900 and it took me all day to get back to you, then you would
probably be a little upset about that.
• You still have my contact info and I am still overseeing your plan; I am just not always
the person who will be reaching out to you.
• This allows me to give you everything you need...everything I promised...Still run the
exact same system as the people who work directly with me, it’s just a little cheaper.
WHICH DO YOU PREFER? (ASSUMED CLOSE)
• So, if you decide you’d prefer to work with me personally, like I said, I have a opening
on my roster right now.
• I like your personality and your goals, you are a perfect fit for who I am looking for, but
it is entirely up to you.
• Again, you would just need to put down an “I’m serious and want to do it, we’d space
the rest out over the program.
• That being said, would you prefer to do Option A work ONLY with me or Option B work
with me AND my team.
If they don’t immediately pick one….
OVERCOME FEAR THEN RESTATE BIG WHY AND WHY IT’S IMPORTANT! (They forgot already.)
Stall (confront decision, don’t need time, need info): You already know everything about how
we service, and remember the yes/no request promise right. We already know people who
need to consider the options usually stay in analysis paralysis. RECAP BIG WHY
Spouse (Past Agreements): Get them to agree that their spouse doesnt agree with their
current condition so why would the object to them changing it. Follow up with asking them
what they think they would say? If yes. Go ahead. If no, deposit down and grab another call
time with the spouse.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 12 of 13 --

High Ticket Sales Script
Page 13 of 13
Price (Value/Cost of Inaction): Make them remember cost of inaction, cost of not doing, cost of
other options, cost of them not achieving their big why. Negative future pace...if you keep
going the way you are...
Use the rest from the sales training & back of the book.
DOWNSELLS
• Downsell #1: Option B WITH A Testimonial -$500. $1997→$1499
• Downsell #2: FREE SERVICE. Buy PIF Ultimate for 3 mo supply (and get continued
programs & nutrition & GROUP accountability) ($1200 = ~$525 net sale)
• Downsell #3: Continue on Ultimates with S&S and we will continue to provide template
guidance instead of 1:1, you’ll get group accountability, etc. (Still a $170/mo EFT).
NO ONE GETS OFF THE PHONE
WITHOUT BUYING SOMETHING!
THEY ALL NEED HELP!
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com
